notes: Won't start at all. Followed tweaks from previous successful reports: updated to latest version of winetricks (20181203) installed dotnet4 with protontricks (albeit with errors re 64bit prefix) and tried Nvidia 410 drivers, none of which worked. Next step is to maybe install clean 32bit wine prefix with the above, but don't want to mess too much more with my system just for this one game.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: install dotnet40 via protontricks, game runs great after that
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Installed protontricks and then ran "protontricks 242640 dotnet40".  After that the game launched and worked perfectly.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Run Protontricks to install dotnet40, and the game will run.  DX9 to OpenGL translation results in relatively poor framerates compared to running the game on Windows with the same hardware, but this is the default state of playing DX9 games so far.  Radeon users can achieve native performance using Gallium Nine and a forked version of Proton with Gallium Nine Extras.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes:
Completed the game and it ran with no issues throughout.

Only tweak done was installing protontricks and then running "protontricks 242640 dotnet40".
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Works flawlessly OOTB with built in mono
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Installs and runs OOTB with latest proton release 4.2-3.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: I tried many times before to get this game working with no luck at all it was borked. I decided to give it another shot, and to my surprise with proton 4.2-3 everything just works perfect. It loaded instantly with no tweeks needed, with no issues, no graphical glitches or anything to report. And I played through for an hour. I`m really happy with this. More of my games library seems to opening up with every proton update. Thanks again valve.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Didn't launch previously but with proton 4.2-4 it now launches with no tweaks required (performance isn't great though with frequent frame drops even testing at 720p low settings). Also experiencing regular crashes (every 5-10 min) where the game freezes and StyxGame.exe has to be killed. Proton logs show opengl shader warnings e.g. "warning C7050: "vs_out[8]" might be used before being initialized". Disabled Steam overlay, reduced textures in game, tested with nvidia 415 and 418 drivers, no such issues with other proton games running 4.2-4, but the freezing persists. Surprising given the other recent reports have no issues, but for me it's sadly a nuisance to play.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: It worked perfectly without any tweaking. No framerate issue noticed.
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes:
Game runs much better now using Proton 4.11-1 with D9VK.
Set Launch Option: PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 %command%
title: Styx: Master of Shadows

notes: Perfect on high settings with D9VK
title: Styx: Master of Shadows
